metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for github.com/xgodev/boost, shipped from the github.com/xgodev/boost-claude repository.

plugins.name: golang-boost
plugins.description: Single-entry, progressive-disclosure skill for github.com/xgodev/boost — one flat index (skills/boost/SKILL.md) one hop away from references/*.md per component, plus a standalone gqlgen-field-resolvers skill. Only the index description loads at session start. Pulls in xgodev/quality-gate for the pre-push comparative gate as a dependency.
